title: Prompt Injection Defense — Implementation Plan
summary: TDD implementation plan for closing H-NEW-6 by wrapping untrusted tenant content in delimiters, truncating to predictable caps, and positioning strict rules last.
notes: Manifest type DOC honored. Plan document with Task 0–4 TDD-shaped tasks including exact code, exact test assertions, exact file paths, exact bash commands. No unverified assumptions marked for Task 0 (implementation straightforward from spec). Companion spec at same ref already on branch.
